address: 71 Chesterfield Road, Ponders End, Enfield, EN3 6BE
lead_profile_text: Second KB entry for same Olalekan Oyewole meeting (2026-06-17). Moving abroad; property owned outright — no mortgage. Monthly running costs ~£252/month (gas £42, WiFi £35, council tax £175). One room may be missing a bed. Departing the country; needs property generating income before departure. Turkey Street National Rail station ~3 min walk (Lea Valley line).
emotional_profile: No financial pressure from mortgage but motivated to maximise idle asset value while abroad. Key risk is post-departure decision delays — Slack channel and full remote management capability need to be foregrounded. Setup barrier is minimal.

One room may be missing a bed

top_objections.text: Ramp-up period: expects 10-15% below projections initially, 6-10 months to full figures

top_objections.text: Competition noted: moderate, average ~19 reviews per listing in the area
top_objections.zac_response: Transport links (Turkey Street 3 min) and Barnet Hospital nearby (~12.77km) provide non-leisure demand

top_objections.zac_response: Stayful can order furniture and handle setup if needed

top_questions.text: Can Stayful fully manage the property while I am abroad?
top_questions.answer: Yes — full remote management. Central booking calendar, Slack channel, monthly income statement on 1st, payout between 1st and 5th. Owner does not need to be in the country.

top_questions.text: How quickly can we go live?
top_questions.answer: 2-3 weeks from signed agreement; first bookings within 72 hours of going live

what_moved_them: Clear profit position: all net income above £252/month running costs is clear profit with no mortgage
Simple setup: only photos (~£250) and key safes (~£30) needed
Fast go-live: 2-3 weeks from signed agreement, first bookings within 72 hours
Full remote management — owner doesn't need to be in the country

conversion_gaps.gap: Risk of going cold after departure if decision not made before leaving
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Create urgency: July peak at £2,343 net — sign before departure to capture peak month from day one

conversion_gaps.gap: Missing bed in one room is an unknown pre-sign
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Request photos immediately; confirm whether bed purchase is needed; Stayful can order and arrange

zac_income_intro: Gross revenue ~£37,608/year; net ~£19,554 (~£1,630/month). Worst month February ~£1,132; best month July ~£2,343. Ramp-up: 6-10 months to full figures, expect 10-15% below initially.
